data.content: Shipment verified: feature branch work/foolery-1f10-concurrent-fix already merged to main (bc1963b82eca) and pushed to origin/main by prior session. CI green (both CI and Coverage Badge workflows passed). Changes: (1) JSONL-based agent outcome stats in .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.jsonl with atomic appendFile for concurrent safety, (2) error exit handling with action-state rollback and retry with different agent via pool exclusion.
